message:
feat(connectors): add provisioning automation for 6 more connectors

Implement provisioning recipes, readiness checks, base_url_policy,
and SelfCheckReport for linkedin (OAuth PKCE), gitlab (PAT),
dropbox (OAuth PKCE), bitbucket (app password), bigquery (service account),
and asana (PAT).

~135 new tests across 6 connectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
